title: Make geometry validity pipeline robust
acceptance_criteria: Pipeline handles invalid OSM geometries via make-valid/skip strategy and completes without fatal topology aborts

title: Emit data-quality rejection report
acceptance_criteria: Per-run report includes skipped invalid features and retained counts by stage

title: Finalize 4-state processed artifacts
acceptance_criteria: Produces buildings_target.gpkg, dem_target.tif, building_height.tif, surface_dsm.tif, tile_manifest.json under data/processed/4states

title: Create wallpaper host Win32 entrypoint
acceptance_criteria: New wWinMain executable target boots process and message loop cleanly

title: Wire AppHost runtime graph bootstrap
acceptance_criteria: Initialization and teardown order is deterministic for host/platform/render/input/ingest subsystems

title: Runtime config and state plumb-in
acceptance_criteria: Host loads runtime config + persisted state and surfaces actionable boot errors

title: Integrate DesktopHost with AppHost
acceptance_criteria: DefView attach path is invoked by executable startup and rebinds on shell events

title: Icon ownership-safe hide/restore integration
acceptance_criteria: Icon hide/restore token lifecycle wired into startup/shutdown/recovery

title: Monitor and DPI topology hookup
acceptance_criteria: Monitor manager updates are connected to active runtime projections and swapchain orchestration

title: Integrate scene renderer with runtime loop
acceptance_criteria: Runtime can render visible 3D map frame from processed assets with no continuous free-run loop

title: Implement manifest-driven asset loader
acceptance_criteria: Terrain/building assets load from tile_manifest and map into render scene

title: Overlay pass integration with dirty-present path
acceptance_criteria: Overlay events reach renderer through dirty-region and throttle path in integrated app

title: Hook interactive camera input to runtime
acceptance_criteria: Mouse/keyboard controls camera in live host window with capture/focus safety

title: Pipe command handling in integrated host
acceptance_criteria: Named pipe command path applies camera/style/span commands and returns ACK/ERROR deterministically

title: User vs IPC arbitration in integrated path
acceptance_criteria: Lease/defer policy prevents jitter under simultaneous user + IPC command streams

title: Session and power transition validation on host
acceptance_criteria: Lock/unlock/logoff/logon/suspend/resume transitions preserve runtime correctness

title: Device-loss and monitor churn validation on host
acceptance_criteria: Integrated host recovers from device lost/reset and monitor churn without restart

title: Desktop demo runbook and operator script
acceptance_criteria: Runbook provides exact steps to launch watchable desktop demo and verify interaction/events

title: Integrated ETW/WPR validation for host
acceptance_criteria: Perf captures and threshold checks run against actual wallpaper_host executable

title: First watchable desktop map demo gate
acceptance_criteria: Gate passes when desktop host is visibly rendering map and supports live input + IPC command demo
